rulesStrings.li: discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Local scouts shared knowledge regarding
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Reviewing local maps alerted us to the existence of
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->A wandering traveler mentioned
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Intercepted communications revealed
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Displaced refugees reported
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Roadside toll collectors were spotted at
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->A deserter told us the location of
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Captured personnel revealed
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->A wounded traveler spoke of
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Guards openly challenge passersby at
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->A drunken drifter let slip the location of
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Unusual traffic along the road suggests
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==false)->Workers were seen hauling goods at
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==true)->Our pulse emitter detected
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==true)->The pulse emitter's scan revealed
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==true)->The pulse emitter's output have confirmed
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==true)->The emitter returned the location of
discoveryMethod(pulseDetected==true)->The pulse we emitted has located
discoveryMethod(traderMentioned==true)->A passing trader mentioned
discoveryMethod(traderMentioned==true)->A wandering merchant revealed the location of
discoveryMethod(traderMentioned==true)->While trading, a caravan driver told us they recently bought wares at
discoveryMethod(traderMentioned==true)->A local trader told us they recently completed a trade at
discoveryMethod(traderMentioned==true)->A merchant passing through mentioned

questDescription(isFirstQuest==true)->[sender_article] [senderColor][sender_label]</color> has contacted you [contactMethod].

[introText]

You can raid work sites by locating them on the world map.

In order to [reason], they are willing to share the location of a [siteType] near [map_definite]. [intelReport][factionDescriptor]

[factionWarning]

[rewardHint]
senderColor-><color=#6495ED>
senderColor-><color=#FFA500>
senderColor-><color=#FF4444>
introText->Megacorporations, local warlords, and colonists use mercenaries and salvaged ultratech to secure their holdings, making them dangerous as adversaries and valuable as spare parts.

introText->Offworld corporations, criminal syndicates, and local enclaves control resources and trade routes. Their private armies and weaponry make them dangerous as adversaries and valuable as spare parts.

introText->Rival corporations, pirates, and settlers are always competing for territory, wealth, and opportunities. Their military hardware and fortresses make them dangerous as adversaries and valuable as spare parts.
reason->disrupt a rival faction's operations
reason->weaken their competitors and advance their political career
reason->climb the corporate ladder by eliminating their rivals
reason->simply cause chaos
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->This site is a subsidiary of [enemyFaction_name]. Attacking it will have diplomatic consequences with their faction.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->This site is a tributary holding of [enemyFaction_name]. Attacking it will result in diplomatic consequences with their wider domain.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->This site belongs to [enemyFaction_name]. Any attack will be an overtly hostile act.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->[enemyFaction_name] manage this facility. Any hostile action will be considered an act of war against them.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->This operation falls under [enemyFaction_name]'s protection. Raiding it will damage your relationship with them.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==false)->This operation runs under charter from [enemyFaction_name]. Raiding it will violate their claims and result in diplomatic consequences.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->Since [enemyFaction_name] is just a small, independent group, you can attack them without any broader diplomatic consequences.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] is an independent operation with no larger faction ties. Attacking them will not affect your other relationships.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->Intelligence suggests [enemyFaction_name] operates independently. You can engage them without risking broader diplomatic consequences.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] is an unaffiliated local group with no powerful allies. Attacking them carries no wider diplomatic risk.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] is unaffiliated with any larger organization. Any conflict will be treated as a private dispute.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] appears to be operating off the books. Any conflict can be dismissed as an internal loss.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->This site is run by a disposable shell organization without any apparent parent backing. Attacking them should not escalate beyond the site itself.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] has no declared interest in this facility. If they are involved, they will deny it.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] is an emerging power with limited resources. The destruction of this site will wipe them out entirely.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->[enemyFaction_name] has no secondary holdings. Destroying this site will also destroy their faction.
factionWarning(faction_temporary==true)->This is a faction's fragile and final foothold. If it falls, [enemyFaction_name] will disappear with it.
